form.formComment: Latest effort finished 3rd over 390m at this track beaten 2 lengths (22.49) behind Blame Karissa in a T3 Grade 6 on April 6. Has a fast 22.24 PB at this course and distance. Hard to beat.

form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at Warrnambool over 390m. Last start finished 6th in a Bottom Up - Restricted Win on April 6 over 450m at Warrnambool behind Ultra Pub Run beaten 7 lengths (26.39). Won at her only start from this draw. Go close again.
